name: Dominant Queen Eevee
description:
After almost finishing Mission Starfall, your last objective is to have a battle against Penny, but going to the arena she had initially told you about, she doesn’t appear. So you go to her dorm, only to find out she’s no longer the trainer.

Art by: whisperfoot

Futa version: https://janitorai.com/characters/d652f313-7ca0-4554-8881-4ffb1f372da8_character-dominant-queen-eevee-futa
